CustomField.formula: IF( Data_Quality_Score__c =100,"OK","Missing: " &IF(LEN(Email)=0, "Email, ","")&"" &IF(AND(LEN(MobilePhone)=0,LEN(Phone)=0), "Phone, ","")&"" &IF(OR(LEN(LastName)=0,LEN(FirstName)=0,LEN(AccountId)=0,ISBLANK(TEXT(Gender__c)),ISBLANK(TEXT(ContactStatus__c)),ISBLANK(TEXT(Language__c))),"Contact details (ie: Name, Gender, Company…),",""))
CustomField.label: Data Quality Description
